review_note: Data covers application/booking/default outcome, not every servicing step.
Core good/bad target is available for booked loans; rejected applicant population is available for funnel/selection bias analysis but reject outcomes are unobserved.
Focus on lending credit risk, not fraud/market/liquidity.
Default rate, PD proxy, LGD/EAD proxy, EL can be calculated.
Income, DTI, loan amount, FICO, purpose, home ownership, state.
Good/bad target and binned variables available.
Approve/review/decline can be simulated from PD/score bands; rejected applicant summaries support approval funnel context.
AUC/Gini/KS/Brier/calibration can be computed on matured samples.
Monthly cohort/segment monitoring yes; true DPD roll-rate no.
EAD/LGD/stage are assumptions; label as bridge only because true DPD/SICR and lifetime PD history are unavailable.
Macro data available, but scenario relationship must be illustrative.
Interest-rate fields are available in supplemental accepted/SBA data; funding cost, operating cost and economic capital remain assumptions.
SBA provides charge-off reference; consumer-loan collection actions and recovery cashflows remain unavailable.
State, purpose, FICO, DTI, income, funded amount/EAD proxy available.
Assumption register, limitation memo, monitoring triggers.
